name: Hyacine

The madness of loneliness and the last ray of hope

The plot is based on one of the cycles where Hyacine met only three Chrysos Heirs, watched people die, and then merged with Titan and suffered during it.

I didn't change my persona because I'm too lazy.

I love the fact that the authors of the plot thought, thought, and decided, "Why don't Hyacine burn alive after taking Coreflame?"
